summary: Approved bounded hybrid TTS retry/requeue implementation after Hermes reconciliation and read-only OpenCode GLM-5.1 review. Scope is limited to pipeline queue/retry state, hybrid worker completion semantics, and focused Go tests. The read-only review identified a narrow activeSynthesis visibility race; Hermes fixed it by reserving activeSynthesis before dequeue and releasing it on nil dequeue.
accepted_changes: SegmentQueue now tracks failed synthesis attempts and permanent failure state per segment.
Hybrid ttsWorker requeues failed mapped segments up to a bounded retry budget and clears retry state on later success.
Hybrid ttsWorker reserves activeSynthesis before dequeue so an in-flight segment is visible to other idle workers before completion checks.
Hybrid completePipeline marks book/status error when permanent failures or incomplete synthesis remain, instead of silently setting synthesized.
Focused tests cover queue retry lifecycle, retry-then-success, and exhausted retry budget error handling.

security_review.notes: No secrets or remote changes were introduced. Origin remote remains the expected HTTPS GitHub URL.

quality_review.notes: Static review found no obvious provider interface changes or API contract breaks. Go compile/tests are blocked because go is missing.
